mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is falling from an already-low level, the discount rate on equities declines further and risk assets reprice upward. A persistent downtrend in policy rates should therefore predict positive S&P 500 returns over the next month, unless inflation is simultaneously accelerating and forcing an imminent policy reversal.
failure_condition: Rejected if 20-day SPX forward returns are not higher after 3-month FEDFUNDS declines than after flat or rising FEDFUNDS, or if the effect disappears once CPIAUCSL inflation is above its trailing 6-month median.

mechanism_narrative: A rising UNRATE above a stress threshold signals weakening household income and profit expectations, which should lead to negative equity returns over the next month. The signal is strongest when labor deterioration is not yet reflected in equities and fails if unemployment rises after a market already priced a recession.
failure_condition: Rejected if triggered UNRATE accelerations are followed by positive 20-day SPX returns in more than 60% of cases, or if the sign flips after controlling for PAYEMS declines.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in HOUST indicates collapsing residential demand and weaker cyclical growth, which should transmit to lower corporate earnings expectations and negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter. The effect should be most visible when housing starts are falling while retail sales remain soft, indicating broad demand deterioration rather than sector rotation.
failure_condition: Rejected if 60-day forward SPX returns are non-negative in a majority of instances after HOUST drops exceed 10% over 3 months, or if the effect vanishes when RSAFS is stable or rising.

mechanism_narrative: Rising INDPRO combined with stable labor and retail indicators signals a real-side expansion in output that supports earnings growth without immediate inflation pressure, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next month. The mechanism fails if industrial output rises only because of inventory restocking while demand and employment remain weak.
failure_condition: Rejected if positive INDPRO shocks do not coincide with above-baseline 20-day SPX returns when PAYEMS and RSAFS are also improving, or if the signal is neutral when demand proxies are weak.

mechanism_narrative: A high but stable FEDFUNDS rate during an inflation downshift is equity-positive because real rates stop rising while the policy stance is no longer tightening. If CPIAUCSL is decelerating and the policy rate is unchanged, S&P 500 should post positive forward returns over the next 5 days as discount-rate pressure eases.
failure_condition: Rejected if short-horizon SPX returns are negative more often than positive when FEDFUNDS is above 4.5% and CPIAUCSL inflation is falling, or if the effect disappears when inflation is flat or rising.

mechanism_narrative: A broad rise in RSAFS signals stronger final demand and better revenue growth for large-cap firms, which should lift equity prices over the next month. The signal should weaken when retail sales increase is concentrated in a period of falling industrial production, because then demand strength is not translating into economy-wide earnings momentum.
failure_condition: Rejected if SPX 20-day forward returns are not positive after RSAFS growth bursts, or if the predictive effect is absent whenever INDPRO is also declining.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous decline in PAYEMS and rise in UNRATE identifies genuine labor market deterioration, which should cause negative equity returns over a one-quarter horizon through lower consumption and margin pressure. This is a falsifiable recession-warning mechanism: it requires both employment loss and rising unemployment, not either one alone.
failure_condition: Rejected if joint PAYEMS declines and UNRATE increases fail to precede negative 60-day SPX returns, or if either series alone explains the effect as well as the interaction.

mechanism_narrative: In a post-crisis housing rebound, a sustained increase in HOUST signals rebuilding activity, easier financial conditions, and improving cyclical confidence, which should produce positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days. The mechanism fails once housing starts rise without concurrent stabilization in employment, because then construction gains are not translating into broad growth.
failure_condition: Rejected if 60-day SPX returns are not positive after large HOUST recoveries, or if the signal remains positive even when PAYEMS is falling and UNRATE is rising.
